name: Function Call With Incorrectly Specified Argument Value
description: The product calls a function with an argument that contains the wrong value, which may lead to resultant weaknesses. For example, passing 0 instead of 1 for a fatal error parameter can cause the program to continue execution when it should exit.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[function_call] node passes an incorrect constant or variable value to TRANSFORM[callee] or EXTERNAL node where the argument value has security implications, such as error handling flags or permission levels
